patch.value: Walk the entire pm-cli project surface (CLI commands, packages, SDK, MCP, CI/release, docs, schema/config, tests, TODO/FIXME markers) and verify the 2026-05-31 living-map fully reflects the ecosystem. Flag any real functionality/code/tests/docs/CI/packages/decisions/known-issues with NO pm representation (neither open backlog nor closed history). Read-only; propose gaps for orchestrator.
Every ecosystem area mapped to a covering open or closed pm item, OR flagged as a genuine gap with dedup search evidence. Structured COVERAGE_GAPS report returned.

value.author: verify-coverage-agent
value.text: Phase 1: Enumerated surface. CLI commands (src/cli/commands/): ~70 files incl activity,aggregate,annotation-command,append,calendar,claim,close,comments,comments-audit,config,context,contracts,create,dedupe-audit,delete,deps,docs,gc,get,guide,health,history,history-redact,history-repair,init,init-agent-guidance,learnings,legacy-none-tokens,linked-artifacts,linked-test-*,list,metadata-normalizers,normalize,notes,plan,recurrence-parsers,reindex,repeatable-metadata-parsers,restore,schema,search,stats,templates,test*,update,update-many,upgrade,validate. Packages(8): pm-beads,pm-calendar,pm-governance-audit,pm-guide-shell,pm-linked-test-adapters,pm-search-advanced,pm-templates,pm-todos (pm-changelog is a SEPARATE repo). SDK: cli-contracts,errors,index,package-import-adapters,package-runtime-options,runtime,testing. MCP: server.ts. Workflows: auto-release,ci,docs,nightly,release. Docs: AGENT_GUIDE,ARCHITECTURE,CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN,CODEX_PLUGIN,COMMANDS,CONFIGURATION,EXTENSIONS,MIGRATION_CLI_SIMPLIFICATION,QUICKSTART,README,RELEASING,SDK,TESTING + examples/.

value.author: verify-coverage-agent
value.text: Phase 2: Confirmed COVERED via pm search (923 closed + 78 open): plugins (pm-claude/pm-codex commands/hooks/agents/skills) = pm-js0r/ash0/d97r/59gj; agent skills (.agents/skills pm-developer/user/sdk/extensions + HARNESS_COMPATIBILITY) = pm-4z9m/48vd/zjuv; installers = pm-tq1; vector stores/embedding providers (LanceDB/Qdrant/Ollama/OpenAI) = pm-kj4/yv2/xutw; CI gates/secrets/nightly matrix = pm-wo8/7rlp/lkd7/gf6f; lock/gc = pm-gbbn/d70h; bundle/code-split = pm-ote/7rlp; ADR log = 32 decisions under pm-m2u1 covering all major arch choices. Schema 4-file model present (types/statuses/fields/workflows.json). No TODO/FIXME markers in src/packages (only DEFAULT_TODOS_FOLDER strings).

value.author: verify-coverage-agent
value.text: Coverage is EXTREMELY thorough. The 923 closed + 78 open corpus represents nearly every ecosystem surface. Notable: (1) community-health files (SECURITY.md/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md/issue+PR templates) covered by closed pm-ixbk; (2) all 8 packages, both plugins (pm-claude/pm-codex commands/hooks/agents/skills), agent skills (.agents/skills), installers, vector stores, telemetry/Grafana stack, ADR log (32 decisions) all represented; (3) NO TODO/FIXME markers in src/packages. Search returns broad mega-items (pm-rnpb/wo8/59gj/ote/7rlp) for many queries because infra was built in large PRs.

value.author: verify-coverage-agent
value.text: Phase 3 (final): Verified ALL ecosystem areas against 923 closed + 78 open items. Coverage is near-total. ONE narrow genuine gap found: .agents/plugins/marketplace.json (the 'pm-local' local-dev marketplace, distinct schema with interface/source.path/policy) is created in closed history (pm-0c9q/pm-ash0) but has NO drift-lock/contract test — tests/integration/claude-plugin-contract.spec.ts (lines 141-145) only reconciles root marketplace.json vs .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, omitting the third .agents/plugins/ file. It can silently rot (still lists only pm-codex, omits pm-claude; no version enforcement). Everything else (all 8 packages, both plugins incl commands/hooks/agents/skills, agent skills, installers, vector stores, telemetry/Grafana, ADR log of 32 decisions, community files via pm-ixbk, SDK examples, completion, lock/gc, restore, init-guidance) confirmed represented.

patch.value: Living-map ecosystem coverage verification complete. Walked CLI commands, 8 packages, both plugins, agent skills, SDK, MCP, CI/release workflows+scripts, docs, schema/config, tests, and TODO/FIXME markers; confirmed each area is represented in the 923-closed + 78-open corpus. Coverage is near-total. Found ONE narrow gap: the third marketplace manifest (.agents/plugins/marketplace.json, pm-local) has no drift-lock/contract test while the other two do. Reported to orchestrator.
Verification task completed during living-map closeout
The task checks its assigned living-map quality area and records whether any blocker remains before PR finalization.
The closed Task 'Verify living-map: ecosystem coverage gaps' completed its verification pass and left no duplicate or hierarchy blocker for finalization.
